title: Hubbell Incorporated (HUBB) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE:HUBB ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call January 31, 2023 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Dan Innamorato - Director, Investor Relations Gerben Bakker - Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer Bill Sperry - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Jeff Sprague - Vertical Research Partners Steve Tusa - JPMorgan Tommy Moll - Stephens Josh Pokrzywinski - Morgan Stanley Brad Lindsey - Mizuho Nigel Coe - Wolfe Research Christopher Glynn - Oppenheimer Chris Snyder - UBS Operator Good day. And thank you for standing by.

title: Hubbell (HUBB) Q4 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: Hubbell (HUBB) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 7.88% and 2.47%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: What's in the Offing for Hubbell (HUBB) in Q4 Earnings?
text: Strong demand for products and strength across the datacenter, communications and renewables markets are likely to have aided Hubbell's (HUBB) Q4 performance. High costs might have dented earnings.

title: Hubbell to Announce Fourth Quarter 2022 Results on January 31, 2023
text: Shelton, CT, Jan. 17, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE: HUBB) today announced it will release its fourth quarter 2022 financial results prior to the opening of the market on January 31, 2023. The Company will then webcast its Analysts' Conference Call to discuss the results at 10:00 AM ET.
